name: 诅咒增幅
description: 将对手手牌中诅咒的行动点消耗改为10
code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const casterOwnerId = caster.ownerPlayerId; const opponentPlayer = battle.players.find(p => p.playerId !== casterOwnerId); if (!opponentPlayer || !opponentPlayer.hand) { return { success: false, message: '对手没有手牌' }; } let modifiedCount = 0; for (let card of opponentPlayer.hand) { if (card.name && card.name.includes('诅咒')) { card.actionPointCost = 10; modifiedCount++; } } if (modifiedCount === 0) { return { success: false, message: '对手手牌中没有诅咒' }; } return { success: true, message: caster.name + '使用诅咒增幅，将对手手牌中' + modifiedCount + '张诅咒的行动点消耗改为10' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '将对手手牌中所有诅咒的行动点消耗改为10' }; }
